channel.title: greedy on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in greedy on changcui

item.title: 剪绳子
item.description: // 思路一：贪心，优先剪3 class Solution { public: int cutRope(int number) { if (number == 2 || number == 3) return number - 1; if (number % 3 == 0) return pow(3, number/3); if (number % 3 == 1) return pow(3, number/3-1) * 4; if (number % 3 == 2) return pow(3, number/3) * 2; } }; // 运行时间：5ms // 占用内存：504k
